scope_summary: World-class CMO synthesis prompts that USE the deepened R2A-D + F14/F15 enrichment data. Each of the 6 sections now produces evidence-cited content (specific keywords, review themes, competitor names, metric numbers) rather than generic Marketing-101 templates. Provenance enforcement + anti-template denylist + Ask-BIQc brand consistency + Contract-v2 supplier-name scrubbing all integrated.

sections_reworked.after: 80-150 word paragraph that cites at least 3 specific signals (brand authority rank, review counts, dominant theme, competitor outrank count, employer-brand health score) — output JSON includes signals_cited array + source_trace_ids

5 fact-bullets each formatted as `{fact with real number}. (Source: {dataset name})` — every bullet tied to a specific dataset (keyword_profile / review_intelligence / workplace_intelligence / competitor_intelligence / advertising_intelligence / backlink_intelligence)

sections_reworked.before: Generic Marketing-101 items hardcoded in _build_swot() — UVP / SEO status string / paid signals string
sections_reworked.after: 3-4 items per bucket, each citing at least ONE of: specific keyword + position + search_volume, specific review theme, specific competitor name (from allowed list), specific staff-review theme — items without provenance dropped by filter_synthesis_swot_with_provenance()

3-5 items per horizon (7-day quick wins, 30-day priorities, 90-day strategic). Each item cites a specific finding: keyword + rank, top-page URL, competitor name, metric name, review theme. filter_synthesis_roadmap_with_provenance() drops items without provenance

sections_reworked.before: Top 3 competitors with name + market_share='N/A' + threat_level
sections_reworked.after: Up to 10 detailed competitor rows: name, organic_keywords (int), organic_traffic (int), common_keywords_with_you (int), paid_keywords (int), threat_level, comparative_positioning (one-sentence diagnosis), where_they_outrank_you (keywords), source_trace_ids

customer_sentiment.weighted_avg_rating + per_platform breakdown + top 3 themes with mentions + sentiment_pct + example_quote (verbatim from recent_reviews); workplace_intelligence.employer_brand_health_score + top_pros + top_cons with example_quotes

prompts_modified.new_router_helper: backend/core/llm_router.py — added llm_trinity_synthesis() (Trinity quorum tuned for CMO synthesis; lower temperature 0.35, larger max_tokens 2400, longer timeout 90s, json_only=True synthesis-leg system message)
prompts_modified.cmo_endpoint_wiring: backend/routes/intelligence_modules.py — added _enrich_cmo_with_synthesis() orchestration that gates on has_sufficient_synthesis_inputs() + per-section thinness check + env flag CMO_SYNTHESIS_ENRICHMENT_ENABLED. Synthesis output passes through provenance + anti-template filters before merge. Errors are non-fatal — never blocks the route.

anti_template_enforcement_layers: Layer 1 (prompt-side): every prompt embeds the FORBIDDEN OUTPUT PATTERNS block listing all 25 phrases — the LLM is told what NOT to write.
Layer 2 (response-side, R2E): is_anti_template_phrase() in core/synthesis_prompts.py — regex sweep with 24 phrase patterns + 11 exact-match denylist — drops any item that slips through.
Layer 3 (response-side, E6 when present): section_evidence.is_placeholder_string() applies a parallel denylist at the SectionEvidence boundary.

provenance_enforcement.swot: filter_synthesis_swot_with_provenance() requires each item to either reference a trace_id from available_trace_ids, OR mention a competitor name from available_competitor_names, OR carry an explicit evidence_tag — items without provenance are silently dropped. Empty bucket signals caller to flip section to INSUFFICIENT_SIGNAL.
provenance_enforcement.roadmap: filter_synthesis_roadmap_with_provenance() requires each item to reference a trace_id, competitor name, brand metric name, or evidence_tag — same drop semantics.

contract_v2_compliance.supplier_name_scrubbing: Three-layer defence: (1) _NEVER_LEAK_RULE in every system prompt instructs the LLM not to mention vendors. (2) _scrub_supplier_tokens() pre-processes the structured input JSON before showing it to the LLM, replacing supplier names (semrush/openai/anthropic/etc.) with the placeholder 'data-supplier'. (3) Existing scrub_response_for_external() runs at the response boundary in get_cmo_report (unchanged).
contract_v2_compliance.external_state_enum: Sections that produce no provenance-backed items flip to INSUFFICIENT_SIGNAL via the existing classify_section / derive_report_state path. Synthesis output never overrides existing rich content with thinner content — gap-fill semantics only.

ask_biqc_brand_compliance.system_prompt_brand_line: All 6 prompts begin with: 'You are BIQc Intelligence Engine — the analyst behind "Ask BIQc", the conversational AI surface inside biqc.ai.'
ask_biqc_brand_compliance.no_alternative_names: Soundboard / Chat / Assistant never appear; tested in test_ask_biqc_brand_in_system_prompt

regression_check.test_contract_v2_enrichment_response: 13 tests passed — Contract v2 supplier-name boundary still enforced.

data_available.demonstrates: Rich enrichment input → all SWOT items cite specific keywords / review themes / competitor names — zero items dropped → DATA_AVAILABLE.

insufficient_signal.demonstrates: has_sufficient_synthesis_inputs() returns False on thin enrichment → orchestrator NEVER calls trinity → zero LLM cost → all sections return INSUFFICIENT_SIGNAL with canonical, non-leaky reason copy.

degraded.demonstrates: Mixed enrichment (reviews + competitors but no keyword profile or workplace intel). Synthesis produces some items with provenance (kept) and some generic items (dropped — including one anti-template phrase). Sections without enough surviving content flip to INSUFFICIENT; sections with rich data stay DATA_AVAILABLE → top-level state DEGRADED.

files_changed.change: added imports + _enrich_cmo_with_synthesis() orchestration + wiring at step 6b in get_cmo_report (~280 lines)
added (sample output builder, no LLM round-trips, deterministic)
